module.name: sequence
module.description: A sequence of terms in boxes joined by arrows — for number sequences, recurrences, iterative processes. One term per section (Markdown/math); optional rule caption.
module.aiSpec:
A SEQUENCE strip — terms in boxes joined by arrows, with an optional rule caption. For number sequences, recurrences (Fibonacci), iterations (x → f(x) → f(f(x))…). Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one TERM per section (Markdown, so \( \) math works). Params: `rule` — caption shown under the strip (Markdown/math, quote if it has commas; default empty = no caption), `sep` — separator glyph between terms (default →), `tail` — true → append a trailing "…" ellipsis box (default false), `color` — box border/tint color (any CSS color, default var(--accent-color)).
<!-- @sequence rule: "\(a_{n+1} = a_n + a_{n-1}\)", tail: true --> 1 <!-- @ --> 1 <!-- @ --> 2 <!-- @ --> 3 <!-- @ --> 5 <!-- @end -->

param.name: rule
param.label: Rule caption
param.desc: Caption under the strip; Markdown/math allowed (quote if it contains commas)

param.name: tail
param.label: Trailing …
param.desc: Append a dashed ellipsis box after the last term

param.name: color
param.label: Box color
param.desc: Border and tint color of the term boxes

snippet.label: Sequence strip
snippet.description: Terms in boxes joined by arrows, optional rule caption.
